results.description: Handler performs no writes, no bus publishes
results.evidence: handler_ledger_hash.py only calls journal.read_bytes() and hashlib.sha256(). Returns ModelLedgerHashComputed directly (no ModelHandlerOutput wrapper — COMPUTE returns result per ONEX rules).

test_compute_is_pure_hash_of_journal PASSED — journal pre-populated with 'line1
line2
'; asserts result.sha256_hex == hashlib.sha256(b'line1
line2
').hexdigest(). Also asserts len(result.sha256_hex)==64 and result.line_count==2.

results.description: Purity note documented — read-only deterministic over external file artifact
results.evidence: Module docstring: 'COMPUTE node: read-only deterministic over the journal file artifact. Returns sha256 + line_count. No writes, no bus publishes.' Explicit purity note distinguishes from mathematical purity.

results.description: Test asserts journal unchanged by compute
results.evidence: Test final assertion: journal.read_text() == 'line1\nline2\n' — compute did not mutate input.
